name: SI Participations S.C.A, SCR
summary: SI Participations S.C.A, SCR is liquidating. It is no longer investing as of January 1, 2017. It specializes in medium-sized unlisted companies, mainly in the Southeastern part of France. The fund usually invests in manufactures, shoes manufacturing, textile, electronics, electricity, chemistry, pharmacy, distribution and business, industrial equipment. The fund seeks to acquire a minority share in its portfolio companies. It was formerly known as Siparex Croissance.
